title: PagerDuty Alert PD-7721 HighKafkaConsumerLag
content: PD-7721 fired for HighKafkaConsumerLag in payments. The embedded runbook link pointed to the Confluence Kafka Consumer Lag Runbook. Notes indicate the on-call engineer created Jira ticket INC-1842 and followed the one-pod restart workflow after confirming brokers were healthy.
